checks.name: Human-readable CLI summary
checks.evidence: format_end_to_end_summary groups completed, skipped, failed and next sections and includes evidence counts.

checks.name: Evidence mapping
checks.evidence: decision_summary.yaml includes evidence_map entries for goal_effect_aligned, tests_passed, dispatch_validated, code_review_passed, retry_required and next_action.

checks.name: Retry plan coverage
checks.evidence: tests/test_run_end_to_end.py covers retry_required when validation fails.

checks.name: End-to-end run
checks.evidence: source .venv/bin/activate && python scripts/run_end_to_end.py --task-id workflow-003 --rerun-policy skip_completed --run-id workflow-003-run --json completed with no blocking issues.
